evals.name: newsletter
evals.prompt: ambition max this over 4 passes: I want to start a small newsletter about the local restaurants in my town
evals.expected_output: A final plan markedly more ambitious than a sober first draft, plus a visible escalation trajectory across the 4 passes. Should stay coherent, not just pile on superlatives.

evals.name: okr-tool
evals.prompt: make this plan way more ambitious, give it 3 rounds: build a small internal tool to track our engineering team's OKRs
evals.expected_output: Final plan escalated over 3 passes with bigger scope/impact, trajectory shown, still a real plan a team could pursue.

evals.name: hackathon
evals.prompt: 10x this idea: a weekend hackathon for my company's 20 engineers
evals.expected_output: Initial grounded plan amplified (default 3 passes since N unspecified) into something an order of magnitude bigger, with trajectory and an offer to dial back.
